channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Catering Staff
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.title: [Gold Job] Steward on SCOV DP2 – 200 EUR per day UK FWP at

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Quick Joining — May 18/19 | Short Contract Until ~May 26

We need a ship's cook who can feed a hungry crew and keep the galley running tight onboard a new and modern live fish carrier. This is a short but intense assignment — good food, clean galley, no drama.

What You Will Do:

  • Cook for 6+ crew members — breakfast, lunch, dinner, and provisions planning

  • Keep the galley clean, tidy, and inspection-ready at all times

  • Assist with light deck duties when kitchen hours allow — team player mindset required

What You Need:

  • Proven cooking experience for groups of 6 or more — restaurant, hotel, or ship galley

  • Valid STCW certificates and seafarer's medical

  • Ship's Cook Certificate (preferred, not mandatory if experience is solid)

  • UK entry eligibility — valid visa, British passport, or permanent residency

  • Valid passport

  • Immediate availability — joining May 18/19, no delays

Why This Assignment:

  • Short contract, full pay — earn solid money in under 10 days

  • Modern vessel galley — work with proper equipment, not a camping stove

  • Aquaculture exposure — niche sector with repeat demand for reliable cooks

Apply immediately with CV, cooking references, and certificates. Short-notice positions close fast.



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Cook — Modern Live Fish Carrier | Short Trip | UK Waters | Immediate Joining at OffshoreCrew AS

item.description:
Location:
Description:

We are looking for candidates for the position of Steward. The position is available on the Geotechnical vessel. The assignment duration is 1 week, starting from 04.05 till 13.05. The location is within 12nm in the UK.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Steward Position on Geotechnical Vessel – Frontier Work Permit Required at ETPM Ltd

item.description:
Location:
Description:

WRS – Worldwide Recruitment Solutions are looking for a Stewardess to join a Geotechnical Drilling vessel in the Netherlands ASAP for 6-8 weeks.

UK working rights needed as vessel will sail there.

You must have:

  • Food Hygiene
  • STCW’S
  • Passport
  • Seaman’s Book
  • Medical


Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Stewardess on Geotechnical Drilling Vessel – STCW Required at WRS - Worldwide Recruitment Solutions

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Duration: 12 weeks starting from 28th May.

Must be able to cook for 15 POB independently.

Must have past experience working independently.

Required certifications:

  • STCW
  • Shipboard catering management course

Looking for Asian crew such as Malaysian or Indonesian with a Schengen VISA.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Solo Cook for AHTS Vessel in the North Sea at Select Offshore

item.description:
Location:
Description:

We are urgently seeking candidates for the position of Steward on the Geotechnical vessel. The position is for a duration of 1 week, starting from 04.05 till 13.05, and the vessel operates within the UK inside 12nm.

Mandatory Certificates: CoC/CoP, STCW BST, STCW SA/DSD/SSO, STCW MFA, Food Safety Hygiene Level 2, Passport, Seaman’s Book, Marlins Test (if not UK national), and 2 recent appraisals.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Steward Position on Geotechnical Vessel – STCW Certificates Required at ETPM Ltd

item.description:
Location:
Description:

We are looking for a Stewardess to join a Geotechnical Drilling vessel in the Netherlands for 6-8 weeks. UK working rights are needed as the vessel will sail there.

Requirements:
- Food Hygiene Certificate
- STCW Certificates
- Valid Passport
- Seaman’s Book
- Medical Certificate

If interested and available, please send your CV and certificates to the provided email.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Stewardess on Geotechnical Drilling Vessel – STCW and Food Hygiene Required at WRS - Worldwide Recruitment Solutions

item.description:
Location:
Description:

ORCA Crew Services is looking for a Hotel Manager to join a cable layer vessel.

Contract type: Several Trips

Vessel type: Cable layer

Starting date: 2026-05-15

Duration: 6 weeks

Location: USA

Special requirements: US B1 Visa, GWO Sea Survival, BOISET, experience on similar vessels



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Hotel Manager for Cable Layer Vessel – US B1 Visa Required at Orca Crew Services NL

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Conditions:
Salary: negotiable
Joining: 03.06.2026
Duration: 4 weeks – rotation

Requirements:
Cook cert;
Hygiene cert or HACCP;
BOSIET or FOET (Opito);
Valid STCW certificates;
Medical certificate.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Second Cook for Cable Layer Vessel – STCW Certificates Required at OJ Crew

item.description:
Location:
Description:

6 weeks contract in North Sea on Jack Up vessel starting 6th May.

Must hold:

  • BOISET CA EBS
  • STCWs
  • Ships Cook CoC


Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Ships Cook – BOISET CA EBS Required at Select Offshore
